text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...
So this is the extent of my current abilities...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry I couldn't meet your expectations.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I misjudged my potential and pace... It seems
there's still quite a bit of work to do.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I misjudged my potential and pace... It seems
there's still quite a bit of work to do.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yes! Thank you so much, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Let's polish me up so I can shine brilliantly in my
next race!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes, of course! I haven't lost sight of my dream,
after all!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Let's set out once more and make it a reality!
